Notes: Single UPDATE contains two identical add_rr operations for the same A RR at dup.campus.edu.; observe whether the server deduplicates, accepts both as idempotent, or rejects the message.

Steps.Description: Send one UPDATE with two identical add_rrs for dup.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.30.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-state of the affected RRset.
